data.current_description: Get a list of Result Instance Information

data.current_summary: Download raw output of scan engine results
data.current_description: Download raw output of scan engine results
data.description_suggestion: Downloads the raw scan engine output in SARIF file format for a specific scan. This provides unprocessed vulnerability data and detailed analysis results from the scan engine. Returns a streaming SARIF file containing comprehensive scan findings. Use this operation to integrate raw scan results with external tools or for detailed analysis.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and actionable. Description lacks important details about SARIF format (mentioned in API context), file streaming behavior, and use cases. Added format specification and integration context to help AI agents understand when to use this operation versus processed results endpoints.

data.current_summary: Get a detailed list of Results
data.current_description: Get a detailed list of Results
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve rolled-up vulnerability results for a project
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves aggregated vulnerability results across all scans for a project. Returns detailed result information including vulnerability details, severity levels, and data flow analysis. Results are rolled-up to show unique vulnerabilities across the project's scan history. Supports pagination and filtering. Use this operation to get a comprehensive view of all vulnerabilities discovered in a project.

Added context about project-level aggregation (rolled-up results per API tag description), pagination support, and clarified this returns project-wide results versus single-scan results for better AI agent decision-making.
